issue_title: fix(forms): split the `touched` model into an input and `touch` output
issue_body_preview:
The `touched` property was never meant to support two-way binding; a control should not be able to dictate that a field is no longer touched.

* The `touched` input represents the touched state of the field.
* The `touch` output allows a control implementation to indicate when the bound field is

issue_title: fix(docs-infra): prevent inline code wrapping in CLI reference table
issue_body_preview:
Inline code elements inside table cells inherited `width: 100%` from the global code styles, causing short codes like `s`, `dev` to stack vertically instead of rendering on the same line. Add `min-width` to table cells containing code to ensure proper inline layout.

issue_title: Dnd list求裤衩哥解惑
'removeEventListener' causes error on chart page
issue_body_preview:
bug重现路径(MBP chrome)：
打开Charts下的任意chart，然后删除掉Cookie中token，再点击任意页面，此时就会有Error。

原因是在Charts下resize.js中的beforeDestroy通过document取sidebarElm然后removeEventListener，但是此时的document是跳转后的login页面，取不到sidebar导致错误。

同样的在Dashboard页面中的LineChart也有这个问题。

issue_title: Fix incorrect DOM order with conditional ContextProvider and inner keys
issue_body_preview:
Resolves #5065

When a VNode is moved via INSERT_VNODE during diffChildren, its old _dom pointer becomes a stale positional reference. Nested diffs that call getDomSibling would traverse the old VNode tree and find this stale _dom, causing subsequent DOM insertions at the wrong position.

Clear

issue_title: fix: Remove postinstall script for playwright setup
issue_body_preview:
Missed in #5060

`postinstall` scripts run after the dependency was installed, not just when installing deps in the repo. As such, this would've broken any `npm install preact` into a project that wasn't using playwright.

Caught by our ecosystem-ci [yesterday](https://github.com/preactjs/ecosys

Fixes #867

`insertBeforeNode` in `dom.ts` had an early `return`

issue_title: Fix CSS processing
issue_body_preview: ATM requiring any CSS from 3rd party authors (i.e. located in node_modules) will be piped through the same pipeline as project's CSS. This means, CSS will be procssed as CSS-modules which, in turn, hides all global CSS making it impossible to consume 3rd party CSS.

issue_body_preview:

issue_title: fix: respect QlPort env var in Docker health check
issue_body_preview:
When `QlPort` is set to a non-default port, the container's `HEALTHCHECK` was still probing the hardcoded `5700`, causing the container to report `(unhealthy)` despite the app being fully operational on the configured port.

- **`docker/Dockerfile`** and **`docker/310.Dockerfile`**: Repl

issue_title: Fix /open/user/init auth bypass allowing credential reset on initialized systems
issue_body_preview: The `/open/*` → `/api/$1` URL rewrite runs **after** the init guard middleware, so a request to `/open/user/init` passes the guard unchecked (it only matched `/api/user/init`), gets rewritten, and hits the credential update handler — allowing unauthenticated reset of admin credentials on an already-

issue_title: Fix cron-parser v5 bundling incompatibility causing validation failures
issue_body_preview:
After upgrading cron-parser from v4.9.0 to v5.4.0, cron expression validation fails in the browser with "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'parse')". The named export `{ CronExpressionParser }` isn't properly bundled by webpack/UmiJS for browser environments.

- **Frontend mod

issue_title: Fix TG_PROXY_AUTH concatenation in notify.js - add missing @ separator
issue_body_preview:

issue_title: fix(renderer): remove the replacement 'div' for ConfigProvider when i…
issue_body_preview:
当renderer中的ConfigProvider未设置时默认以div进行兜底，但这样做的坏处就是div会影响布局，当我们以flex布局整个应用时，div不会继承高度，会导致内部的flex布局组件因为缺少高度失效。
建议当ConfigProvider为空时不创建元素，ConfigProvider可以由上层封装自主实现，因为不同的组件库ConfigProvider的属性是不一样的，目前也仅传入了device和locale，所以面向pc和移动端不同的组件库当前方案实际上也无法满足需求，不设置renderer的ConfigProvider这种场景是存在的。

Split the CTE in blockRunWithWaitpoint so the pending waitpoint check
is a separate SQL statement. In READ COMMITTED isolation, each statement
gets its own snapshot, so a separate SELECT sees the latest committed
state from concurrent completeWaitpoint calls.

Previously, the CTE did INSERT + pendin

issue_title: Fix hydration error
issue_body_preview:
Calling router.replace / router.push (or any other router method) is not supported during render. You have to do that kind of call in `useEffect` or a handler for an interaction like onClick / onSubmit. `redirect()` and `notFound()` are designed so that you can call them during rendering.

Fixes #

issue_body_preview:
使用相关的问题请确保先看了 Wiki 《划词翻译食用方式》 <https://github.com/crimx/crx-saladict/wiki> 。

不能划词的网站请提供具体链接。刚安装扩展后已经打开的页面需要刷新一遍以加载词典。

如果是查词结果不正确或无结果，请先点击结果左上的词典图标跳转到词典网页，查看是否为自身网络问题。

因安全问题，chrome 商店页面、自带的 PDF 页面以及其它扩展的页面是不能划词的。可用点击图标或三按 ctrl 快速查词，本扩展自带 PDF 阅读器。

请根据模板描述问题，以便作者理解和解决。

issue_body_preview:
Related PR: https://github.com/radix-ui/primitives/pull/2130

For TypeScript and Node.js to support the ECMAScript Module, the exports field must be specified.
It is my understanding that the module field currently specified in package.json is a 'non-standard' field supported by webpack/rollup.

window.getComputedStyle() returns null inside an iframe with display: none

This causes react-sortable-hoc to throw `TypeError: can't convert null to object`

The workaround is to return an array with

issue_body_preview:

This commit just moves the `ng-repeat` directive to the `li` level to fix it.

fix: convert backslash paths to forward slashes for Tailwind v4 on Windows
issue_body_preview:
## Summary
On Windows, Tailwind v4 @source directives break because `path.resolve` uses backslashes, resulting in missing utility classes (like `rounded-xl`, `shadow-xs`, `ring-1`) from the compiled CSS.

This commit converts the backslashes to forward slashes.

## Problem
Closes #890

## Solution
W

issue_title: isDevelopment in webpack v5 causes an error 'process is not defined'
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
webpack v5 doesn't provide a mock of `process`, so `isDevelopment` causes an error 'process is not defined'.
(Note that `webpack.DefinePlugin` replace just `process.env.NODE_ENV` (not `process`), so `process` is still `undefined` even if `process.env.NODE_ENV` is available.)

issue_title: fix: 🧩 修复notification、message组件被overlay层覆盖问题 Close #466
issue_body_preview:
在element-plus组件库中，像`ElMessage` `ElNotification` `ElMessageBox`  `ElDialog`  `ElLoading`这些组件中，根据渲染的顺序z-index默认会全局递增，后面渲染的组件具有较高的层级，会之前渲染的组件之上。这个设计是正确的，大部分时候符合交互的直觉。因此在我们的代码中，不能为一些组件指定固定的层级，这样反而造成像 issue #466 这样的Bug。

element-plus实现全局z-index递增源码：
![image](https://github.com/HalseySpicy/Geeker-Admin

issue_title: fix: 修复会话内搜索多次跳转不加载附近消息并增加点击防抖
fix(chat): 修复消息搜索结果的发送者信息和头像加载
issue_body_preview:
## 变更内容

这次主要修了聊天页搜索相关的一组问题，重点是搜索结果的稳定性、错误暴露，以及群聊场景下发送者信息的展示。

- 修复会话内搜索结果里发送者名称显示成 `wxid` 的问题，优先展示用户名或群昵称
- 修复全局搜索跳转到详细会话后，历史消息未加载时搜索上下文丢失的问题
- 修复搜索过程中切换会话过快时，结果串会话、串消息的问题
- 修复首次进入聊天页后，第一次搜索不生效、第二次才有反应的问题
- 优化会话内搜索的发送者资料补全流程，避免阻塞其他请求
- 头像加载失败时增加失败缓存，减少重复 404 请求
- 搜索结果里的头像在资料补全阶段显示加载中的圆形图标

## Fix

.notion-table-cell .notion-pag

issue_title: fix: use components.Link for inline text links to prevent nested anchors
issue_body_preview:
## Problem

When `components.PageLink` is overridden (e.g., to render a custom `<div>` container instead of `<a>`), the inline text decorators in `text.tsx` create nested DOM issues. Specifically, the `'p'` (page mention), `'‣'` (cross-workspace link), and `'a'` (internal URL) decorators all use `co

issue_title: fix: traverse alias_pointer in getPageContentBlockIds
issue_body_preview:
## Problem

`getPageContentBlockIds` traverses `transclusion_reference_pointer` to resolve referenced blocks, but it does not traverse `alias_pointer`. When a Notion page contains alias (synced) blocks, their content is not included in the page content block IDs, causing those blocks to not render.

issue_title: fix: respect hide_inline_collection_name for inline database views
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

Notion uses two different properties to control collection title visibility depending on how the database is embedded:

- **Linked views**: `collectionView.format.hide_linked_collection_name`
- **Inline views**: `block.format.hide_inline_collection_name`

The current code only checks the

issue_title: fix: handle page_content_first gallery cover type for linked database views
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

When a Notion page embeds a **linked view of a database** (as opposed to an inline database), the Notion API returns `gallery_cover.type` as `"page_content_first"` instead of `"page_content"`.

The `CollectionCard` component only checked for `"page_content"`, so linked database gallery c

Fix: "Ghost" Tag Filtering
**Context**: Users observed tags (e.g., "Report") appearing in collection items that did not exist in the collection's schema. This indicates stale data in the item's properties that was deleted from the global schema but not the individual blocks.

issue_title: [BUG] status 404 not respected for NextResponse.rewrite
`applyRule` does not require a `fix` field

A few changes in the ASTGrep utils:

- The `fix` is not more required in `applyRule`. That's because you might only be interested in the returned `matches`
- The `fix` can be an empty string (to delete code)
- Added a `parseCode` function to parse source code - the existing `parse` takes a path.

issue_body_preview:
当定位目录时，位置上下文在表格中时，获取到的元素是表格中的元素，导致定位不准。
所以在定位目录的命令中，强制将上下文指定为全局上下文，获取全局顶层元素，使定位准确。

issue_title: feat(perf): Remove unfixable rules
issue_body_preview:
ESLint always lint with all rules you provide, even if you call it with the fix command.
It does this to be able to show you information about the rules it could not fix.
We don't display those messages, so we can remove all unfixable rules and allow ESLint to do less work and in turn run faster.

issue_title: Fix NPE breaking admin page config
issue_body_preview:
On the first execution of the Jenkins collector there is a NPE that prevents the collector document for Jenkins from being created. This prevents the General Configuration page from showing the Jenkins configuration.

NPE is avoided by initializing the offending fields in the HudsonSettings class.

issue_title: remove unused `testResultType` from collector. Fixes issue #2908

address issue #2908 

This stems from when I moved to the visitor pattern to pick up the test results instead of specifying the result type on the UI. I left the boilerplate code for `testResultType` in the Step.

issue_title: closes #2892 - Fix for Jira Collector requiring manual insert for Issue Type IDs
issue_body_preview:
Removes the requirement for the properties to use:
```

```

Now the collector only relies on `feature.jiraIssueTypeNames=` to have the issue type names in a comma separated string as usual.

- This means clicking a link annotation in the Vue build never triggers `selectOverri

This caused small inaccuracies when measuring element width.

issue_title: Final Draft import: error on import (element.Text[0].toUpperCase is not a function)
issue_body_preview:
Fails if child `<Text>` has attributes.

This works:
```xml
<Paragraph Type="Character">
  <Text>
    Henry
  </Text>
</Paragraph>
```
This doesn't:
```xml
<Paragraph Type="Character">
  <Text Style="">
    Henry
  </Text>
</Paragraph>
```

issue_title: fix: 移除画布的 CSS transition 属性以解决拖拽卡顿问题
issue_body_preview:
### 概述

本 PR 修复了一个严重的性能问题，该问题导致在拖拽 simple 流程设计器画布时，出现异常的卡顿和“不跟手”现象。其根本原因是作用于主画布元素的 CSS `transition`
属性与拖拽操作中高频的 `transform` 更新产生了冲突。

### 问题分析

- `.simple-process-model` 元素上存在一条 `transition: transform 0.3s ...` 样式规则。
- 在拖拽过程中，JavaScript 会监听 `mousemove` 事件，并以极高的频率（每秒数十次）更新 `transform` 属性来移动画布

issue_title: Fix: disallow calling .set on primitive values within createSetter internal
issue_body_preview:
### Overview

`createSetter` will currently call `.set` on primitive values, like numbers, if they have had their prototype modified. Koota is an example of a library that does this. This is because a mistaken check is done on the parent of the prop rather than the prop itself. This PR fixes that.

issue_title: Fix: Mac terminal appears blurred in high zoom levels
issue_body_preview:
### Blur Fix - Mac only
<not issue in electron/Tauri Edge(chrome) based browsers.
Tauri mac native zoom does not update window.devicePixelRatio, causing the xterm.js WebGL canvas to render at 1x resolution regardless of zoom level. The native zoom then upscales the bitmap, producing blurry termina

issue_title: fix: use outerWidth/outerHeight for Tauri new window dimensions
issue_body_preview:
Tauri's WebviewWindow constructor treats width/height as outer size, but innerWidth/innerHeight only gives the content area. This caused each File > New Window to shrink by the title bar and border size.

Related: https://github.com/phcode-dev/phoenix-desktop/pull/689

issue_title: Unovis Svelte: Optional `x` and `y` accessor for Axis, Brush, FreeBrush, Crosshair, Timeline
issue_body_preview:
In the Svelte wrapper of _Unovis_, `x` and `y` accessors are mandatory for all XY components. However in the library, they are optional for _Axis_, _Brush_, _FreeBrush_ and _Crosshair_, which can cause compilation errors.

For the **Timeline** component, `x` is mandatory and `y` is optional.

issue_title: Fix unbound-method ESLint error for useControl hook methods
issue_body_preview:
The `change`, `focus`, and `blur` methods from `useControl` trigger TypeScript ESLint's `unbound-method` rule when destructured.

## Changes

issue_title: fix: 修复连续收藏后台只显示最后一条的问题
issue_body_preview:
问题描述
修复了连续收藏多个帖子时，进入收藏夹后台只能显示最后一条收藏记录的问题。

改进方式
1. 修改了收藏保存逻辑，将收藏内容保存到`bookmarks`数组中，而不是单个`bookmarkData`对象
2. 每次收藏时检查URL是否已存在，避免重复添加
3. 更新了收藏页面的逻辑，使其能够读取并处理`bookmarks`数组
4. 保留了对单个`bookmarkData`的向后兼容支持

修复后的效果
现在用户可以连续收藏多个帖子，所有收藏都会被正确保存并在收藏夹中显示，而不仅仅是最后一条。

测试后本地无问题

issue_title: fix: prevent self-contained details block from absorbing subsequent content
issue_body_preview: When `<details>` and `</details>` appear in the same html_block token, `combineStructuredDetailsHtmlBlocks` fails to find a separate closing node (`closeIndex === -1`) and consumes all subsequent nodes as children. This causes details styling (e.g. `background-color`) to bleed into following paragra

issue_title: fix: guard getKatexSync() behind isServer to prevent SSR hydration mismatches
issue_body_preview: `resolveInitialState()` in both `MathInlineNode` and `MathBlockNode` called `getKatexSync()` unconditionally on server and client. When a sync KaTeX loader is registered only in a client-only plugin (e.g. Nuxt client-only or CDN setup), the server renders a raw text fallback while the client synchro

issue_title: fix: pass node props to custom components when using nodes prop with customHtmlTags
issue_body_preview: When `MarkdownRender` receives pre-parsed nodes via the `nodes` prop, custom HTML tags (e.g. `<thinking>`) retain `type: 'html_block'` instead of the tag name. The component resolver only matched on `node.type`, so registered custom components were never found — falling back to `HtmlBlockNode` which

issue_title: fix: 修复大图查看器在窗口 resize 后位置/缩放错乱与画面闪烁
issue_body_preview:
## Summary
修复了在查看大图时切换浏览器窗口大小后，WebGL 图片查看器出现位置偏移、缩放基准异常，以及调整窗口过程中可能出现的画面闪烁问题。

## Changes
- 在 `WebGLImageViewerEngine.resize()` 中：
  - 记录 resize 前画布尺寸与当前变换。
  - resize 后重新计算 fit 基准缩放（`initialScale`）。
  - 保持用户当前“相对缩放级别”（相对 fit 的 zoom 倍率）。
  - 以“resize 前视口中心对应的图像点”为锚点重算平移，避免画面跳动和错位。
  - 应用边界约束，并在缩放/位移

Fixes the `UNABLE_TO_GET_ISSUER_CERT_LOCALLY` TLS error that causes GitHub OAuth and thumbnail fetching to fail inside the Docker container (issue #257 regression).

## Root cause

The runtime image is based on `scratch` and copies the Alpine CA bundle to `/etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.

2. **`/thumb/` image proxy** – `fetch(cdnUrl)` fa

issue_title: Fix issue with menu not saving correctly
issue_body_preview: In the CMS menu editor, the hidden input only gets filled if you actually move something.  If you just hit 'Save' without adding a new menu item, then the input remains empty, gets submitted as empty, and then the Menu Model calls ::truncate() to drop all rows in the DB, thus clearing your menu.

issue_title: Mockdate latest release has broken website examples
issue_body_preview:
d3fc depends on Mockdate v2.x, and site examples have script tags referencing `src/mockdate.js`. However, as of Mockdate v3 the JS entry point is now; `"main": "lib/mockdate.js"`

The site build process ensures that we always pull in the latest version of MockDate:

https://github.com/d3fc/d3fc/

As a result they were appended every time the page was visited, causing a me

issue_title: fix(workbox): add additional details for uncaught errors and fix chromium CORS
issue_body_preview:
When opening chromium devtools on first load, it makes a request that violates Request.cache spec: ([chromium#823392](https://bugs.chromium.org/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=823392))

> The "only-if-cached" mode can only be used if the request's mode is "same-origin". Cached redirects will be follow

issue_title: fix: precached files are not updated
issue_body_preview:
I stumbled upon an issue - my main page was not updating. (route `/`).
After lot of digging I found, that it's precached inside service worker and is not updated, even when updated service worker is uploaded.

Some more about this issue with my comment here:
https://github.com/nuxt-community/pwa

issue_title: fix(meta): prevent build failure for ios splash image when no icon is used
issue_body_preview:
When the icon is set to false in config, or when the icon is not found correctly, pwa._iosSplash is undefined.
This prevents access to its proprieties and thus the nuxt build failure.

I added also a console.warn that might help in debugging future issues, to try to make it obvious that no icons

issue_title: fix(meta): add missing `router.base` prefix to favicon
issue_body_preview: The favicon must be accessible from any page and it does not matter how deep the page is. The only possible solution is to use a relative url.

Removes the defaults for the meta `theme-color` and the manifest `theme-color` taken from the nuxt loading bar.

To keep user configuration to a minimum, the manifest theme-color's default is now the meta one, if set.
In most real world scenarios they tend to coincide.

Doc

issue_title: fix: restore expand functionality broken in v1.0.3
issue_body_preview:
The expand feature was broken due to untrack() wrapper around setHeight() which prevented reactive updates needed for expand animations and layout.

- Remove untrack() from setHeight() call to restore reactivity
- Keep untrack() around deleteToast() to prevent nested effect updates
- Fixes expan

issue_title: Support nested conditionals
issue_body_preview:
Nested conditionals work in React by adding more conditions in the JSX expression ```{ condition1 && condition2 && content }```

But in Vue, it seems that only the first conditional is taken into consideration.

This is an example UIDL I was testing with:

```
{
  "type": "conditional",
  "

issue_title: Static data source can overlap prop or state
issue_body_preview:
When a static dataSource is used for a repeat node, the content (an array of values) is added on the `dataObject` (`teleport-plugin-vue-base-component` in `utils.ts`, line 124).

If no meta values are specified, the a default `items` name is used. This can easily overlap with props or state, as vi

issue_title: Default props are not being generated in case of only boolean prop is present
issue_body_preview:
When our UIDL have only a single PropDefinition which is a boolean, the ``defaultProps`` and ``propTypes`` are not generating.

UIDL to replicate

~~~
{
  "$schema": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/teleporthq/teleport-code-generators/master/packages/teleport-generator-core/src/uidl-schemas/

issue_title: Fix/#175 Components name are same as generated from Router
issue_body_preview:
Update to the string conversion functions + tests. We will go with a standard from now on:
- all component names when used in JS will be camelCase or UpperCamelCase
- all file names will be dashCase (including the import statements for local dependencies)
